title: onagra media
intro: Onagra media, also known as wild poppy or California poppy, is a perennial flowering plant native to the western United States and Canada. The medicinal properties of this plant include its ability to act as an antispasmodic, sedative, and antiseptic, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of using Onagra media include relief from insomnia, anxiety, and restlessness, as well as pain relief and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Onagra media can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
